title: Written Communication
description: Students demonstrate the ability to express ideas clearly and effectively in written form across a variety of disciplines and contexts.

title: Quantitative Reasoning
description: Students demonstrate the ability to reason with and about numbers, symbols, and data to solve problems and make decisions.

title: Critical Thinking
description: Students demonstrate the ability to analyze, evaluate, and synthesize information to form reasoned arguments and judgments.

title: Oral Communication
description: Students demonstrate the ability to communicate effectively in spoken form to diverse audiences in various contexts.

title: Information Literacy
description: Students demonstrate the ability to locate, evaluate, and use information effectively and ethically to accomplish a specific purpose.

title: Global Citizenship
description: Students demonstrate an understanding of global interdependence, diverse cultural perspectives, and their role as responsible global citizens.
